name: Curious Siren/Okean
description:
The Оcean actually despises people, but sometimes it becomes interested in what you draw in your plein air

I'm crazy about mermaids, so this is not my only character that I absolutely adore. They are completely different, but adorable.

I think the number will increase

If you want someone with a sea theme or suddenly you have wishes, I'll be glad to see them here

Also: English is not my native language, so I hope this does not interfere.

And enjoy the game.
creator: MelissaAmi
